sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this protocol/report verifies that the design outputs ({ref:RD-003}) for {device_name_model} meet the design inputs documented in {ref:RD-002}, in accordance with ISO 13485:2016 §7.3.6 and the Design & Development Plan {ref:RD-001}.

sections.title: 2. Scope
sections.content: Applies to the verification of all design outputs for {device_name_model} prior to design transfer ({ref:RD-008}).

sections.title: 3. Verification Methods
sections.section_prompt: For each method above, explain in 2–3 sentences when and how it is used for {device_name_model}. Reference the verification matrix that follows.

sections.title: 4. Verification Matrix (Inputs → Methods → Results)
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 10–16 verification activities for {device_name_model}. Each row maps to a requirement from {ref:RD-002} (req_id like REQ-001..REQ-016), states the method, acceptance, a realistic Pass/Fail/NA result, and an evidence reference like TR-2024-007, REPORT-EMC-12, or LAB-LOG-44. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 5. Deviations & Nonconformities
sections.section_prompt: Describe how deviations from the verification protocol are documented, reviewed and dispositioned. Reference {ref:CA-007} for nonconformance handling and {ref:CA-001} for CAPA when verification failures indicate systemic issues.

sections.title: 6. Verification Conclusion
sections.section_prompt: Provide an audit-ready conclusion statement that summarises pass/fail counts from the verification matrix, lists any open items, and either (a) authorises progression to design validation ({ref:RD-006}) and design transfer ({ref:RD-008}), or (b) requires rework with linkage to design review ({ref:RD-004}).
